description: Credit approval memo with facility amount, ratios, rating, and conditions
parsed_text:
COMMERCIAL CREDIT MEMORANDUM
Memo Date: 2026-03-01
Borrower: Prairie Ridge Manufacturing LLC
Industry: Precision metal components
Relationship Manager: Aaron Patel
Underwriter: Mia Chen
Request: Approve $4,250,000 equipment term loan
Total Exposure After Approval: $5,100,000
Purpose: Acquire CNC equipment and refinance existing equipment debt
Collateral: First priority lien on financed equipment and blanket lien on business assets
Guarantors: Elena Morris and Daniel Morris
Current Risk Rating: 5
Proposed Risk Rating: 5
PD: 1.85%
DSCR: 1.42x
Debt/EBITDA: 2.8x
LTV: 72.0%
Liquidity: Borrower maintains $1.6MM unrestricted cash and positive operating cash flow
Covenants: Minimum DSCR 1.25x; maximum Debt/EBITDA 3.25x; quarterly compliance certificates
Policy Exceptions: Equipment appraisal older than 90 days
Approval Authority: Regional Credit Committee
Approval Status: Approved subject to conditions
Approval Conditions: Updated appraisal; executed guaranties; UCC-1 filing
Next Review Date: 2027-03-01
